trivia_bullets.text: Bear Trap is one of DSK's 'common horror objects' -- everyday implements recontextualized as weapons in a survival horror setting, alongside Conductive Machete and Baseball Bat. It is the only printing of this card in Magic's history; Scryfall prints search returns exactly one result.
sources: CoolStuffInc: The Flavor Gems of Duskmourn: House of Horrors, Jay Annelli, 2024
Scryfall: prints search, reprint field = false

trivia_bullets.text: At {1} with Flash, Bear Trap enters cheaply at instant speed. Its activated ability ({3}, {T}, Sacrifice: deal 3 damage to target creature) is a delayed kill shot. The card is Pauper-legal and PauperCommander-legal, giving it reach into common-only constructed formats beyond Standard and Commander. EDHREC rank: 18,403.

"Every time its teeth tasted blood, its hunger grew, until one day it was no longer a trap but a hunter." Consistent with Duskmourn's design ethos that inanimate objects in the house become sentient and predatory through Valgavoth's influence; the flavor text maps the trap's mechanical damage output onto a transformation narrative.
sources: Wizards: Duskmourn Vision Design Handoff Part 1

trivia_bullets.text: Artist Michele Giorgi. Card was previewed directly by Wizards of the Coast on 2024-09-06. No Hipsters of the Coast coverage found for Giorgi at time of research.
sources: Scryfall: artist field, preview source field
